title: Inter-board Dependencies
excerpt:
Hello, 
I was wondering if there was any way to set up dependencies between items on separate boards. I have multiple workstreams that have dependencies on each other. The link & mirror columns aren’t quite what I am loo…

posts.author: sshh (Samip Shah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I was wondering if there was any way to set up dependencies between items on separate boards. I have multiple workstreams that have dependencies on each other. The link & mirror columns aren’t quite what I am looking for.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sshh!

There is no cross-board dependency automation functionality just yet but that’s great feedback for our team!

Let us know at support@monday.com if you need any help setting up a workaround or if you run into any questions!
